notes: US company listed on AIM London. Reports in USD under US-GAAP. Filings are PDF annual reports and investor presentations from IR website. No SEC EDGAR. Annual Report 2024 covers FY2024+FY2023 (US$000). H1 2025 Interim Presentation has historical results table FY2009-FY2024 (US$ millions). filings_sources URLs verified from investors.somero.com.

dividends_per_share.note: Ordinary full-year DPS: $0.089 final + $0.080 interim = $0.169 per share (USD). SRC_002 results presentation shows DPS in US cents (16.9c ordinary + 4.1c supplemental special); unusable due to cent/dollar scale ambiguity for automated extraction.
Ordinary full-year DPS per SRC_001 narrative and FY2023 annual report: US$0.2319 per share.
